_comment: ALL-MICROSOFT verified knowledge base. Every entry has a real source_url and verified_on date (2026-06-12). The agent recommends from this VERIFIED tier and cites source_url. Web-search results are a SEPARATE flagged/unverified tier handled in code. Before submission: re-open every source_url, confirm it loads, refresh verified_on. Do not add anything you have not personally opened.

opportunities.title: Microsoft Learn — free self-paced training, learning paths & practice assessments
opportunities.summary: Microsoft's free, self-paced learning platform: structured learning paths, hands-on modules, and free practice assessments aligned to certification exams. Completely free, no card required — the natural starting point and the prep ground for the AZ-900 / AI-900 / SC-900 / DP-900 / PL-900 Fundamentals certs.

opportunities.title: Microsoft Virtual Training Days — free / discounted Fundamentals exam voucher
opportunities.summary: Free, live, instructor-led Microsoft online events. Attending the full event earns an exam voucher for a Fundamentals certification — commonly AZ-900 (Azure), AI-900 (AI), SC-900 (Security), DP-900 (Data), PL-900 (Power Platform). Open to ANYONE — no employer, student status, or card required. STATUS / HONEST NOTES (verify each time): some sessions grant a 100% free voucher, others a 50% discount — check the specific event's email; the voucher is applied to the Microsoft Learn profile of the email you registered with, usually within ~5 business days; vouchers commonly expire ~90 days after issue, so book the exam early; free vouchers do not cover retakes. This voucher route REMOVES the Nigerian-card barrier because no card is needed at exam checkout.

opportunities.title: Microsoft Cloud Skills Challenge ('30 Days to Learn It'-style campaigns) — free/discounted voucher
opportunities.summary: Time-limited Microsoft Learn challenge campaigns where completing the modules earns a free or discounted certification exam voucher. Self-paced within the campaign window. STATUS: these are periodic — availability depends on whether a challenge is currently live, so check the official Microsoft Learn challenges page for an active campaign before relying on it.

opportunities.title: GitHub Foundations / GitHub certifications + free GitHub Skills training
opportunities.summary: GitHub's official certification track (GitHub Foundations is the entry-level cert) plus GitHub Skills — free, interactive, hands-on courses for learning Git/GitHub. Training is free; the certification exam has a fee, though GitHub periodically runs free-voucher campaigns — verify current campaigns rather than assuming one is live. Strong fit for a learner already using GitHub/Copilot.

opportunities.title: GitHub Student Developer Pack — free pro developer tools (STUDENTS ONLY)
opportunities.eligibility: Verified students only. Requires proof of enrolment / student status (school email or document).
opportunities.summary: Free bundle of professional developer tools for verified students: Microsoft Azure credits, GitHub Copilot, JetBrains IDEs, MongoDB Atlas credits, DigitalOcean $200 platform credit, a free .dev/.app domain, and more. Apply at education.github.com/pack. HONEST CAVEATS: offers change frequently and may require annual re-verification; 'no credit card' applies to the GitHub pack itself, not necessarily to Azure (Azure keeps its own identity/billing rules); pack approval does NOT automatically grant Azure for Students. Surface this ONLY to people who indicate they are students.

opportunities.title: Azure for Students — $100 Azure credit + free services, no card (STUDENTS ONLY)
opportunities.eligibility: Verified students only. Usually needs a school-issued email/domain, or verification via the GitHub Student Developer Pack.
opportunities.summary: Gives verified students USD $100 in Azure credit plus free access to popular cloud services for a year, with no credit card required. HONEST CAVEATS (important for Nigerian students): eligibility is region-dependent — some regions only qualify for 'Azure for Students Starter' (NO $100 credit) or are blocked entirely; a personal Gmail/Hotmail alone often does NOT qualify (a school-issued email or the GitHub pack route is usually needed); Azure may still ask for a card for identity verification or pay-as-you-go beyond the credit. Surface ONLY to students, and include the eligibility caveat.

opportunities.title: Microsoft AI Skills Fest — free official AI learning event (verified-legitimate)
opportunities.summary: PLACEHOLDER — confirm details before relying on this. Microsoft AI Skills Fest is Microsoft's official, free global AI learning event: time-limited challenges, live/on-demand sessions, and skill-building on Microsoft Learn. Registration and participation are free on the official Microsoft site; the canonical link is the aka.ms short link. Use this entry to POSITIVELY CONFIRM a pasted message that names 'AI Skills Fest' AND points to an official aka.ms / microsoft.com link. Verify the current event dates/deadline on the official page before acting.

pitfalls.title: Nigerian cards blocked for Microsoft/Azure & exam (Pearson VUE) payments
pitfalls.problem: Nigerian debit/Verve cards are commonly rejected for Microsoft Azure subscriptions and for exam payment on Pearson VUE (which delivers Microsoft certification exams). Prepaid/virtual cards are often not accepted, and Azure is sold in Nigeria via partners rather than directly — so a fully-prepared learner can still be blocked at checkout purely by card/country restrictions.
pitfalls.workaround: Best path: earn a FREE exam voucher via a Microsoft Virtual Training Day or Cloud Skills Challenge — a voucher needs no card at checkout, sidestepping the barrier entirely. For Microsoft Learn training itself, no payment is required. Where a card is unavoidable, Pearson VUE accepts Visa/Mastercard/Amex/JCB credit cards and you can pay/schedule in person at a nearby test center. Verify any third-party 'pay for you' service very carefully before sending money.

pitfalls.title: Fake 'President Tinubu N50,000 cash grant' — phishing scam (NITDA warning)
pitfalls.problem: A viral 'President Bola Tinubu N50,000 Cash Grant' scheme is FAKE. Nigeria's NITDA (statement by spokeswoman Hadiza Umar) confirmed the associated site is a phishing website built to harvest full name, phone, home address, email, and bank account details. Similar fake 'government cash/grant' pages recur regularly.
pitfalls.workaround: Do not click unknown 'grant' links or enter personal/bank details. Government programs are announced through official channels. Verify suspected scams with NITDA-CERRT: cerrt@nitda.gov.ng, +234 817 877 4580, www.cerrt.ng. Rule of thumb: a real grant never asks for your bank login or a fee to 'release' funds.

pitfalls.title: Fake NELFUND student-loan portals impersonating the government site
pitfalls.problem: Scammers run fake NELFUND (student loan fund) portals, often falsely claiming the President is 'reopening' applications to create urgency and trick students into entering credentials and bank/NIN details. NELFUND has repeatedly denied such orders.
pitfalls.workaround: Only use the official NELFUND portal; never enter NIN, bank, or email passwords on a link sent via social media/WhatsApp. If you shared details: change passwords (email, bank, NIN), contact your bank to freeze/secure the account, and report to NELFUND and the Nigeria Police Cybercrime Unit. Fraudsters often test stolen data within 24–48 hours, so act fast.
